skills.name: agent-detector

runtimeEval.optimizationSuggestion: ALL descriptions need optimization — 0% positive trigger rate. Descriptions are not 'pushy' enough per skill-creator docs. Claude handles these tasks natively without consulting the skill. Descriptions should explain WHY consulting this skill produces better results than Claude's default behavior.
runtimeEval.note: skill-creator run_eval.py — 1 run per query, 5 queries (3 positive, 2 negative)

strengths: Well-structured 4-layer detection with clear priority order
TOON tables for all structured data — good token density
weaknesses: 800 tokens for always-loaded skill — heavy for auto-invoke
agent_defaults table duplicates info that should live in agent files
Task triggers use fixed boost scores — rigid, not principle-based
recommendations: Reduce to ~500 tokens by removing agent_defaults (load from agent files)
Replace fixed boost scores with relative ranking principles

skills.name: angular-expert
strengths: Good code examples for DI and RxJS patterns
weaknesses: 1100 tokens of content Claude already knows
No decision criteria — when to use signals vs observables?
Overlaps with framework-expert angular section
Pure checklist/reference — doesn't expand Claude's capabilities
recommendations: Reduce to ~300 tokens of Angular-specific gotchas Claude gets wrong
Use Context7 for up-to-date Angular docs instead

skills.name: api-designer
strengths: Good table format for REST conventions
weaknesses: HTTP status codes and REST conventions are common knowledge for Claude
No API design PROCESS — just a reference sheet
No integration with workflow or other skills
Pure checklist, no principles for design decisions
recommendations: Replace with API design PRINCIPLES (when GraphQL, when RPC, etc.)
Focus on decision criteria not reference data

crossCuttingIssues.issue: Auto-invoke token budget is 6050 tokens — 6x over the 1000 target

crossCuttingIssues.issue: 10 framework expert skills duplicate knowledge Claude already has (~10,000 tokens total)
crossCuttingIssues.recommendation: Reduce each to ~300-400 tokens of GOTCHAS. Use Context7 for reference docs. Savings: ~6000 tokens.

crossCuttingIssues.issue: framework-expert (auto-invoke) duplicates all individual expert skills
crossCuttingIssues.recommendation: Keep EITHER framework-expert OR individual experts, not both.

crossCuttingIssues.issue: Most expert skills are checklists, not principles that expand capabilities
